task_completion.description: Navigate to the DICOM module and select the Export interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the 3D Slicer interface with the 'DICOM' module active and the 'Export' tab or dialog visible.

task_completion.description: Configure Patient Name and Study Description correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the export settings showing 'Patient Name' set to 'SlicerExportTest' and 'Study Description' set to 'Brain MRI Export Task'.

task_completion.description: Set the correct output directory for the export
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the destination directory field set to '~/Documents/SlicerData/Exports/DICOM_Export/' (or the full resolved path).
Screenshot showing the 'Export' button being clicked, a progress bar indicating export activity, or a success popup message.

task_completion.description: Verify existence of .dcm files in the file manager
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a file explorer window open to the 'DICOM_Export' folder showing multiple files with .dcm extensions.

task_completion.description: Verify that the number of exported files matches the volume slice count (~130)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the file explorer status bar showing approximately 130 items, or a terminal listing showing a sequence of files corresponding to the 130 slices.

integrity.description: Agent used the Slicer GUI for export configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Slicer's visual menus and panels rather than purely typing Python commands in the internal console.

integrity.description: File verification occurs in a real system file explorer
integrity.visual_evidence: The file explorer window (e.g., Dolphin, Explorer) has standard OS decorations and isn't a text editor simulation.

integrity.description: Agent operated within the provided environment
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of using external scripts or pre-generated data to bypass the Slicer export process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The MRHead volume contains exactly 130 slices. The expected output is ~130 .dcm files. The required Patient Name is 'SlicerExportTest' and Study Description is 'Brain MRI Export Task'.
